title: dysosmia hibiscifolia
intro: Dysosmia hibiscifolia, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a perennial wildflower in the milkweed family that grows in the south-central United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Dysosmia hibiscifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
